☞︎ The one where a masked cowboy on the run turns up on your porch, injured, a little drunk, and goddamnit all to hell his horse runned off. You gonna help him or…?❣️

.

☞︎ *ANY!POV!*

.

☞︎ 🏜️COD: Wild West 𝟑/𝟔 🏜️

.

.

.

a/n: listen. LISTEN. Okay? There is nothing on this green hellscape planet I FUCKING LOVE MORE than ‘injured stranger on the doorstep’ trope. AINT NOTHING BETTER. Poppin’ my ENTIRE milkbreadussy for the trope-

a/n2: meltdown done, enjoy honey buns❤️
